description: Product Description Avlash Tealight Candles Pack of 50, 8 Hour Burn Time Shrink Wrapped Long Time Burning Candles . Avlash Tealight Candles are top quality Pack of 50 tealight candles. Shrink wrapped for convenience , it allows up to 8 hours of burning time and can be used for any kind of decoration purposes. These shrink wrapped tealights candles are the perfect touch for a variety of occasions such as birthdays, weddings, yoga studios, spa, bathrooms & more. The clean and classic design won't compete with your décor and the compact size won't take up a lot of room. The warm and relaxing light of these candles tealights will create a charming, relaxing atmosphere that elevates the mood in any room. Perfect for those long events. Perfect Christmas gift for your family, friends, or loved ones. Avlash Tealights Candles are made from Great quality materials mixed with incredible utility that ensure premium quality.
